user.title: Connect to Vault
user.description: Enter the host and port of your Vault backup manager instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Unraid server running Vault (e.g. 192.168.20.21)
data_description.port: Port number for the Vault API (default: 24085)
data_description.tls: Enable to use HTTPS/WSS for encrypted connections

auth.title: Authentication Required
auth.description: This Vault instance requires an API key. Enter your API key below.

data_description.api_key: The API key configured in your Vault instance

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Vault
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for this Vault instance is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

data_description.api_key: The new API key for your Vault instance

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Vault
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details of your Vault instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Unraid server running Vault
data_description.port: Port number for the Vault API
data_description.tls: Enable to use HTTPS/WSS for encrypted connections
data_description.api_key: API key (leave empty if authentication is not required)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Vault. Please check the host and port.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.

abort.already_configured: This Vault instance is already configured.

run_backup.name: Run backup
run_backup.description: Trigger an immediate backup run for a Vault job.

job_id.name: Job ID
job_id.description: The Vault backup job ID to run.

job_name.name: Job Name
job_name.description: The name of the Vault backup job to run. Provide either Job ID or Job Name.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional target Vault config entry ID. Leave empty when only one Vault instance is configured; required when multiple instances are configured.

restore.name: Restore backup
restore.description: Restore an item from a Vault backup restore point.

job_id.name: Job ID
job_id.description: The Vault backup job ID that created the restore point.

restore_point_id.name: Restore Point ID
restore_point_id.description: The ID of the restore point to restore from.

item_name.name: Item Name
item_name.description: Name of the item to restore.

item_type.name: Item Type
item_type.description: Type of the item to restore.

passphrase.name: Encryption Passphrase
passphrase.description: Required if the backup was created with age encryption.

destination.name: Destination Override
destination.description: Optional override for restore destination path.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional target Vault config entry ID. Leave empty when only one Vault instance is configured; required when multiple instances are configured.

test_storage.name: Test storage connection
test_storage.description: Test connectivity to a Vault storage destination.

storage_id.name: Storage Destination ID
storage_id.description: The ID of the storage destination to test.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional target Vault config entry ID. Leave empty when only one Vault instance is configured; required when multiple instances are configured.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to Vault. Please check the host and port.

api_error.message: An error occurred communicating with the Vault API.

invalid_job_id.message: No backup job found with the specified ID.
